title: Deriving the Minimum Mean Square Error (MMSE) Forecast
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step logic and mathematical process for deriving the optimal forecast that minimizes the expected squared prediction error.
relationships: Information Set is the input for the Forecast Function
Forecast Function produces a Forecast for the Future Value
Future Value minus the Forecast equals the Forecast Error
The square of the Forecast Error is used to calculate the MSE
The Minimization Process finds the Forecast Function that minimizes the MSE
